movie.actors: Renée Zellweger, Matthew McConaughey, Robert Jacks, Tonie Perensky
movie.plot: A group of teenagers get into a car crash in the Texas woods on prom night, and then wander into an old farmhouse that is home to Leatherface and his insane family of cannibalistic psychopaths.
movie.title: Texas Chainsaw Massacre: The Next Generation
movie.writer: Kim Henkel (characters), Tobe Hooper (characters), Kim Henkel
